review_text: Amazing location, amenities are top notch, very coastal beach vibe
Stayed here for a few nights in our caravan. Great location, excellent camp kitchen  and beautiful clean showers and amenities. Will happily return one day.

Awesome park, dogs welcome and great facilities for kids, lovely communal room fab camps kitchen, could do with some items to use, great when you've forgotten a utensil.
Showers etc are great, spotless and beautiful hot water.
Excellent location close to town and opposite the beach
They new grassed sites look amazing, a few more would be perfect 👌
Loved the check in system, a tx giving gate code and site number, just head in, plus given option to arrive early 😀
Powered site with ensuite. Lovely well maintained park.

Decent facilities and a friendly staff. However, smoking is allowed and I had two groups in Caravans chain smoke the entire 3 days that I was there, w prevailing winds against me. Since smoling is allowed, staff couldn't do anything about it, and as a result, I'll never stay there again. Sincerely - Martin

Sehr toll und gepflegte Anlage - gerne wieder.
Spezielle die (vermutlich neuen) sanitären Anlagen sind toll!
Fantastic booked a couple of cabins absolutely brilliant thank you

Camp pitch was huge, ground was rock hard so struggled to get pegs in. Site is clean and great location. Showers were nice and clean and water is hot. Good facilities and clientele all round.
Only negative was for some reason the kids on the site would hang around the entrance cable drop which was annoying, no parents in sight
Best experience ever in Australia 🇦🇺 loved it. All facilities are as per the pictures ... only issue was with Kettle ( previous users kept it unclean)

Absolutely fab campsite, the facilities are some of the cleanest we have ever experienced. The sites are well looked after and the staff were super helpful. No issues checking in late, you receive the gate code and your plot number via text. It is a very popular site with families because of the facilities but by 8:30pm the site was very quiet!
Great location, about a 30 min walk from the main area but there was always beam scooters sat right outside the front gate. Make sure you wake up for sunrise and hopefully see dolphins!

The best of experiences here. The email and sms check-in an out process made thing’s super easy. You can go see the friendly staff in person of course if that’s not your thing. Camp kitchen and games room feel like home spaces. It was busy when we were there but never felt crowded or noisy.
Has all the features of top class caravan park. At $65 pnight for a solo travellor you would hope so
Very nicely appointed cabins. Great location. I would love to return and stay longer.

Really disappointed with the call I had.
I was not able to use their service as the receptionist on the phone was really rude and would not let me finish my question. Their website indicates availability for sites and cabins on certain dates, but the lady was like a broken record saying 'we are fully booked' despite me trying to clarify the dates I was interested in.

Is this the future we're heading towards? The most commercialised feeling park that we've been to.
A star given for the quality amenities, otherwise there is nothing special about how this place is run at all.
Their approach is that there's nothing that can't be managed by a new rule, another sign, or by sending out a mass text.
Reviews about overcrowding, gravel and sand everywhere are an unfortunate reality.
Unlike other premium family centric parks the prices become particularly disappointing when you realise you'll spend most of the time venturing outside of the park just to find things to do.

Worth every cent. Great location. Plenty of toilets/showers/laundries, all very clean. Grounds are well looked after and beautiful. Pool which was a treat as the beaches here don't seem swimmable. Love the txt check in, don't have to go to reception. One of our favourite parks we've stayed at.
Good location, and able to drive straight into site on arrival was great (through pre-arrival check in). Facilities were good quality and clean.

I recently spent two nights at the Esperance RAC Holiday Park, and overall, it was a very pleasant stay. The park itself is beautifully maintained, with well kept lawns, clean facilities, and plenty of space to relax. Walking around the grounds, it’s clear that a lot of care goes into keeping the park neat and welcoming. The surroundings are picturesque, and the location makes it a great base for exploring Esperance and nearby attractions like the beaches and national parks.
Our campsite was comfortable and had enough room for our caravan
and a small setup for outdoor seating. The amenities, such as showers and toilets, were clean and functional, which made the stay convenient for both short and longer visits. It’s the kind of place that feels calm and peaceful, perfect for a relaxing getaway in nature while still having the comfort of a well-run park.
However, one area that could use improvement is the kitchen facilities. While there is a shared kitchen available for guests, it lacks essential items like cutlery, knives, pans, and other basic cooking utensils. This meant we had to bring our own or adjust our meal plans, which was a bit inconvenient, especially for families or travelers who prefer cooking their own meals. Having these items provided would make the park much more convenient and enjoyable for all visitors.
Despite this small issue, I would still recommend Esperance RAC Holiday Park for its beautiful setting, clean facilities, and peaceful atmosphere. It’s a great spot for anyone looking to enjoy Esperance while having a reliable and well-maintained place to stay. Just make sure to come prepared if you plan on using the kitchen.
Great place with view
Very loud and busy park. The camp sites don't feel private and the staff didn't seem to care when I had some complaints.

Overall good. Only issues were the ground is very difficult to install tent pegs so I would recommend heavy duty pegs for sure. Also there is no restriction times on new arrivals. People arrived at half past midnight on the pitch next to us and put up a tent. The noise was terrible which was a bit annoying when there is a 10 pm noise curfew in place. When I reported it to the receptionist the next day she was not helpful at all. Just be prepared.

Super emplacement, super bonne toilette et douche chaude top
Avec piscine et autres commodité
Camping was good
Best location, great caravan park and you can't fault this place.
Just awesome. Very well run caravan park. 2 min drive to town. Beach over road.

Very fancy place. We'll structured, practical, near by everything you need down there in a spot on location. Cabins very comfy, even more than where I live. I was really impressed. Defo an excellent option of stay.
Great location. Family friendly with good amenities. Wish the pool was heated

More than a 1 year ago (Feb 2025), I booked for 2 powered sites for at RAC Esperance Holiday Park the second half of January 2026. This was for us and for our friends from the Netherlands. They would go on a road trip from Sydney to Perth and we would meet in Esperance around that time frame. When asked if we could book for 2 or 3 nights, this was not possible according to the staff member. It is high season with summer holidays, so the policy is a minimum of 6 nights to book. Fully understand this, so wanted 2 sites next to each other, which was agreed upon by the staff member.

When I contacted 2 weeks before our arrival date, it was made clear by the new staff member that it was not registered in the system to have 2 sites next to each other, but she would do her utmost. When we arrived, it was not possible and nothing was in the system about this request. Which is a shame as we asked for it almost 1 year before the actual arrival date.
More surprisingly was the fact that some of our neighbours were leaving after only 2 or 3 nights, while they arrived the same time and some sites were then occupied by new neighbours, who were also on a road trip, who explained they made bookings 2 weeks before arrival and that they were allowed to stay for 3 nights. This is against the policy I was made aware of, so I am very disappointed in RAC Esperance from a service point of view.

RAC Holiday Parks should understand that when people from overseas are on a road trip, they simply do not have the time to stay on 1 campsite for a minimum of 6 days. Allow for such travellers to stay shorter number of days. If you praise that service is high in Australia, accepting such an approach would show service.

I have travelled a lot in Europe (I am Dutch) during high season and never had to stay a minimum of 6 nights at campsites. And believe me, there are more people travelling in Europe than in Australia during summer holidays.

The camping itself is great, good facilities like toilets, showers, camp kitchen, etc. and close to town centre.
Awesome. Great location. Heaps of stuff for the kids to do in the school holidays. We've rebooked for next year

This review will be a little biased as I am still in shock with the prices.
I'm not sure at what point it became acceptable to charge $75 per night for a 6 x 6 mtr section of gravel.
The general area is clean, however the clothes washing/drying facilities leave a lot to be desired.
You'll likely end up spending more on drying your clothes than you did for the stay. We had 2 loads of washing, for washing and then drying them cost $40.... The dryers do not work well at all and will require substantial time to dry even the smallest load.
We're not staying long enough to rate or review the rest of the park. We pulled up somewhat late, took out a small personal loan to pay the fees for a caravan site and left in the morning.
I'm still gob smacked with the price.

Just had a wonderfulc10 days at this park. It is so well cared for, camp kitchen and ablutions spotless. The BBQ's are always clean which is a big job with so many using them.
The shower water even stays in the shower stall and doesn't flood the whole bathroom like at Exmouth RAC.  Maybe you could give them some pointers.
Caravan sites are (unwatered) dead grass with boggy sand, different to the pics. No response from management after enquiry.

Such a great caravan park, so easy to check in with multiple text messages providing information on how to access the park and get to our site along with information on what to do in the Esperance area. There are multiple shower blocks that are new and clean. Dog friendly.
Next beach town centre clean amenities
It all went well and i loved the park also they are happy to help with anything
Great caravan park. Toilets and showers are always kept very clean.  Kitchen area is very clean.

Wow. We stayed at the RAC Esperance Holiday park over Christmas and we had the most incredible stay. This park is beautiful. Amenities were clean and modern. Camp kitchens- amazing. Playground, pool and roomy sites. Location 10/10  We will be back.
WOW, Nice place expensive, love the pool.

家族と来るならいいかも

来ないけど！

We stayed for 5 nights in a studio cabin and it was like home away from home. We had everything we needed, fully equipped kitchen, laundry facilities etc. Check in was very easy and efficient, the grounds are well maintained and tidy. We 1000000% recommend staying here, so close to the ocean for a morning walk, accessible to the town centre and they also would have food trucks some nights and a coffee cart some mornings. We stayed as a couple but looks like it’s awesome for families and groups aswell. We will definitely be staying again whenever we are in Esperance!
Top quality caravan park, has large sites. Heaps of tree shade. Kitchen has everything you need. Great pool. Overlooking the ocean. Well maintained and kept clean.

Just fell short of the best rating due to the dust/sand/dirt/pebble rock flying around from the caravan/camping sites in the wind. Covered our stuff in our awning everyday and walking around the park getting peppered in the face . It wasn’t pleasant. Definitely  needs work to go into the caravan/camping sites.||Pool was always clean & warm on an avg overcast day. Amenities were clean and well looked after. Activities for the kids due to school holidays were on every day . One man band, food tent & Distillery van was there one night. Enjoyed our stay .

Booked a powered caravan site. Our lot is amazing, with morning sun shaded by our awning and tree cover for the afternoon and early evening. Site is not too windy as well. Though it is next to the main road, but it wasn't too noisy.

Shared toilets and camp kitchen are up to date and clean!

Communications from the team is top notch. Multiple sms to facilitate check-in making it a breeze.
Stayed for a couple of weeks in our caravan so nice beautiful views friendly staff very clean, definitely recommend 👌
Amazing carvan sites, incredible camp kitchen and overall amazing everything!
Fantastic location, walking to the beach only 2 minutes.

Der Park ist sehr schön, allerdings geht es auch um das Preis-Leistung-Verhältnis. Bei dem höherwertigen Preis erwarte ich Tücher zum Abtrocknen in den Badezimmern (ein Fön nutzt keiner und hilft nicht beim Abschminken am Abend) sowie Schwamm, Spülmittel und Geschirrtücher in der Küche.

Anscheinend gibt es auch unterschiedliche Waschräume. Die bei uns in der Nähe waren leider Sammelräume und keine privaten wie die auf dem Foto.

Great stay for 3 nights.
Salt water pool is awesome.
Across from beach so our site had a view. 10 minute drive to spectacular beaches.
Only issue we had was kids unsupervised in the rec room constantly putting absolute garbage on YouTube on the TV.
It was hard to keep our young kids out of there so it was pretty annoying to have that constant battle going with our ND kids.
Eventually reception kept the remote and left it on abc kids which was great but it was a daily issue.
Bathrooms clean, showers way more spacious than standard.
Family bathroom was great too.
The park was fully booked but didn't feel cramped or busy.

The arrival and check in  process was so smooth and easy with text messages for gate code and same for departure. The facilities were amazing so clean and new. The salt water pool and area was beautiful with fabulous amenities. The cabins even though we stayed in our caravan looked lovely. Plenty of shady trees and accessibility to all sites really superb. Advice try to get a site not so close to main access, children on bikes and scooters were a concern and noisy in the morning, otherwise super safe for kids with a great playground and just across from a lovely beach. Bit of a nice walk 10 mins to closest shops. The park staff were friendly and accomodating. My only other advice is the maintenance person not use the blower so early in the morning!!! Would give 10 out of 10 100% best for dogs too. Great beach and a wonderful dog washing facility at the Caravan Park $10 for 10 mins enough to wash out two mini schnauzers!!!!

Nice spot when travelling to Esperance.
The staff were friendly and warm and very accommodating. The park was swarming with kids who were living their best lives between their sites, the rec room, pool and everywhere in between.
The bathrooms are cleaned daily, making them on so very clean and hygienic, they're quite spacious too. The showers were AMAZING!
Thankyou so much to Jess and her team. Your kindness when we got there early one morning and when we came back to get our site details was truly appreciated.

We had a camper van on a powered site for  2 nights.  The facilities are top class and kept clean.  The pool is beautiful and the grassed area had entertainment playing for the evening which provided a great place for families to hang out.
It is immediately across the road from the beach so is abit windy especially in the front of the camp.
Would recommend staying and enjoying this spot.
The place is huge..staff are great...scenery is amazing bathroom is clean and tidy..

Faciliteiten zijn netjes. Lijkt het enige nette caravan park te zijn in de omgeving. Wij vermoeden dat dit ook de reden is dat ze het zo druk hebben. Wij verbleven eind oktober op dit park en het was al compleet volgeboekt. Wij waren niet erg tevreden met onze plek, maar een andere plek was niet mogelijk. Park zit wel aan een drukke openbare weg. Het park is op zich mooi, maar ons wel iets te druk en op elkaar gedrukt. Onze voorkeur gaat toch echt wel uit naar caravan parks wat meer in de natuur.
Leuk aanrader: een coffeetruck die er bijna dagelijks staat voor het park waar je heerlijke flat whites kan halen!
Lovely park on the esplanade. Nice amenities and pool .
In Caravan fabulous facilities
The facility was clean and enough beds to accommodate 5 ppl. Every tools are well equipped. Perfect stay.

As with all the RAC resorts i have used this again meets all my expectations, lots of spaces, plenty of well kept toikets and showers and a good decent laundry. Nice kitchen always open, and great access to the beach.
A huge play room and outside play areas for the kids
Best park ever and reflected in the price.
Guter Caravan Park. Es gibt alles was man braucht. Wir waren in einer Cabin.

Wir hatten ein Bungalow, was sehr modern eingerichtet war. Es hatte alles was wir benötigen und es war sehr sauber. Auch das Internet war sehr schnell mit 100 Mbits. Kannst du Campingplatz war sehr gut ausgestattet. Es hat ein Pool so wie Waschsalons und Pingpong Tisch und eine Lounge.

Only good things to say! Well priced, decent location right opposite beachside, and the best toilets, public showers and kitchen we’ve ever encountered at a caravan park. Clearly very well maintained, cleaning schedules are printed and displayed so you can adjust your cooking/wash times. Small but good selection of necessities at the shop by reception, and smooth check in process. All booked online and very efficient! Will definitely visit an RAC holiday park again. Very pleased 🥰

Superb location. Our one bedroom villa was in a quiet spot, but still near to the beach. Loved the spacious accommodation. Very comfortable bed. Great shower. The TV's in the lounge room and bedroom were excellent. The lounge seating was very comfortable. Nice dining space. Great swimming pool area. Overall, this is the best place we've stayed on this trip. We were very happy here and would recommend this accommodation to anyone.

We did enjoy our stay here. Camp kitchen and family bathrooms are great. No 5 stars as we did not like our site (60). Right next to the cable gate with people walking across our site all the time as there is no pathway and chain smokers close by :(
Also, check in is quite late for a camp site (2pm). They say they need to water the lawn. There was no lawn on our site/ row. I guess they just don't want people using the facilities. We had to drop our trailer in town to spend the day at the beach.
Caravaning and sites were very spacious. Great location. Immaculate amenities. Grounds and common areas beautiful with playground and big pool. Loved our dogs too
Fantastic holiday park, excellent amenities and spacious caravan sites. Highly recommend this park.

I have travelled all over Australia this park has the best bathroom facilitys I have ever seen , for caravan traveller's  coming from the nullabor this place is like heaven cannot compliment this place at a very reasonable price on what they have at there park

Just here at the moment and I must say, it is awesome! I give 5 star for accommodation as it is just perfect! We got a villa, seafront and we are enjoying it so much. Beds super clean and comfortable, dishwasher, washing machine, microwave, cooker, oven, Nespresso... showers are great! The facilities around the villa are incredible. Waking up with that view.... what else can I say?
Worth it every cent! Highly recommended!

We stayed on a powered site for two nights.

I can see why this is such a popular family park,  it’s in a great location, close to the beach and bike paths, which we made good use of during our stay.

The amenities were clean, and we had no issues accessing the laundry facilities.

The sites are quite close together, though, I felt like I was sitting in my neighbour’s area at times, and they can be a bit tight to reverse into.

I really appreciated the convenient check-in process. They send all your details via message, so you don’t even need to leave your car to check in or out. Brilliant idea and more parks should do this!
Soo nice to be and stay here!
Wow, what a great place, showers toilets emackulate

Great caravan park with tremendous attention to detail. Fabulous position. Staff very helpful. Sites towards the rear of the park are excellent. The swimming pool and area surrounding the pool is first class. The camp kitchen is just incredible.

We had a lovely holiday in Esperance. Spent most time fishing at 4wd accessible beaches like Bandy Creek and Lucky Bay. The RAC park was lovely. We stayed in a beach front 2 bedroom chalet. It was clean and new. We enjoyed it very much. The only negative feedback is :1 The busy road in front of the chalet. Traffic was very heavy most of the day. 2. The parking for this chalet is about 150 m from the front door. This is very inconvenient for older people .Carrying your heavy luggage, food etc  was not easy.  This was  disappointing for the top dollers  you pay. We have travelled extensively over Australia and usually the parking for this kind of accommodation is right next to the door. We have a small trailer for extra luggage and fishing gear. We had to leave this near the office in the visitors parking area. These 2 negatives would not affect everybody but it is something to consider if you are older. Other than this we had a lovely stay.
A really great park with plenty of trees and super clean. Loads of ammenities and a great camp kitchen a rec room also very clean and tidy. Ten min walk into Esperance.

Great facilities and clean bathrooms however totally let down by the rude, patronising lady on reception. I had 2 interactions on 2 different days both the same. She was speaking down to us as if we were an inconvenience and completely ruined our stay before it even began.

Would not recommend at all, the worst we’ve experienced in WA.

We (me, my brother and my mom) loved our stay at RAC Esperance Holiday Park! Monique was super friendly and helpful, and the whole place had such a nice, chill vibe — it honestly felt like a little village.

Our van site was perfect, clean bathrooms, great facilities, and even a pool. The night was quiet and peaceful, with really calm and respectful neighbors.

The only downside was the Wi-Fi, which kept dropping, so we could barely use the internet. But apart from that, everything was amazing — would definitely stay here again!

Pulled into the park late without a booking but the lovely staff graciously gave me the emergency spot right up the back, saving me a long trip to Norseman, as all the Esperance van parks were full. I will be forever grateful especially to Monique, I think her name was, you guys are just the best!!

Lovely tidy park, very well organised, with electric car charging right next to a dog friendly beach. What more could you ask for!

Great RAC Esperance Park, fantastic place to stay and close to the shops.
Camped here for 3 day's very clean park and beautiful scenery.
Great park- very accommodating as we were travelling with a charity-The Long Ride  - Prostate Cancer and Men's Health

Never disapointed by a RAC caravan park. 2 of us with a 4WD with roof top tent. Ammenities are great as always and clean. Location just by the Beach. Pool and barbecue with large kitchen. Only the wifi was really not working properly at the time we were there

We stayed three nights in a powered site with our rooftop tent and really enjoyed our time here. The facilities are excellent — bathrooms, kitchen and common areas are super clean and well maintained, and the whole campground is spacious and well organized.
A couple of small downsides: you can’t pay for the laundry tokens by card, which feels a bit old-fashioned in 2025. Unfortunately, we couldn’t do our laundry and really needed it after several days on the road.
On our last night we also received a message informing us that some strangers had entered the park, apparently trying to steal something — which we actually appreciated because the staff warned everyone immediately. However, it might be a good idea to have a night security person doing rounds to avoid this kind of situation.
Overall, a great experience and a really well-kept campground — we would definitely stay again!😊

It was the best week camping at the caravan park. The facilities are amazing. The toilets and chairs are lovely. Clean great layout easy Access beautiful service some great spots to head out to our lucky Bay Walton Bay. Hellfire and Esperance beaches are just beautiful. It’s got everything you need right down the road shopping centre. Great place a holiday with the family.
Great park with clean facilities and beautiful location on the water. Good activities for kids as well.

Great park. We had a powered caravan site for a week. The amenities are quite new and kept clean and stocked. There were some issues however it was OK as there are plenty of extra toilets.
The park is opposite the beach and a close walk into town or to the Jetty. We would definitely recommend stopping here.

Great facilities. Washing up sinks. Roomy showers & laundries well placed. Every night we grab a table in the spacious kitchen to play games with our group.
SMS check in felt strange, but avoided a queue !
Great place to spend your night after a long drive 😊👍

We always love heading to Esperance for the school holidays, and we always stay at RAC Esperance Holiday Park. The kids have a blast hanging out with other kids in the pool and rec area, also the facilities and amenities are awesome. Sites are spacious for caravans and tow vehicles.
All in all great vibe everything's close walking distance.

Very tight sites backing onto busy noisy road. Amenities are clean and kitchen is great.  For families it’s a great setup, but if you value a bit of space and some quiet time this place cant deliver. Expensive, can’t recommend
The best park ever. Thank you RAC for making caravan stays a memorable pleasure.
If you like camping in a sardine tin with no privacy then this is the place for you. Ensuites are full of bugs and run down already. Would not stay again.
Stayed 3 nights, caravan powered site, and we can't fault it.  This would be the best caravan park we have ever stayed in|We wish to visit again but in summer

Lovely location . Well laid out and presented with modern amenities.
Only downside is the lukewarm showers and the fact the lights went out twice whilst trying to wash my hair. ( No I did not take a long shower, especially with the water temperature as it was).
I have paid less than half these nightly prices over 9 weeks of travel and have had enjoyed hot showers and no issues with lights.
It’s probably the best thing I look forward to after travelling so was disappointed, given the first impressions of the park.
Noticed there are many other reviews with same feedback. Hoping it is addressed as I only write this for the benefit of future customers.

Fantastic location we were just chillin for our trip across the Nullarbor.
Beautiful park.
Perfect location fully serviced accommodation.

We stayed at an un powered site, has a  big camp kitchen, play room, pool and showers and toilets.  Showers did not have much hot water that would be only downer, they are all new and clean. The kettles in camp kitchen were very dirty, maybe they should be cleaned, so would not use the kettles in kitchen. Lovely park close to shops and beach is accross the road. The place itself Esperance is absolutely beautiful 😍 🤩

I have just stayed four nights in my trailer camper, I found the modern facilities to be clean and well maintained. My wife and I will most definitely return but for longer next trip,  we'll done staff.  Jeff from NZ
Excellent site with brilliant facilities in a great location. Everything was lovely and new. Would highly recommend

A large group of us stayed at RAC Esperance caravan park in various cabins.||The park is very well laid out and has great facilities, the park kitchen is first class, with lots of cooking facilities, fridges, BBQ's and heaps of tables. ||The park it self is very clean and tidy The cabin we had was extremely well presented and functional. ||The biggest down side was parking, the parking bays may met Australian standards, but are very narrow when considering that a vast majority of country Travellers use larger than average size 4 WD's.

Very modern well maintained park. Staff pleasant and check in made easy. Great location and the facilities are excellent. One point of constructive piece of advice, hot water system in new amenities block is set to low. A number of people mentioned the luke warm water. The set temperature appears to be set below the Australian Standard for hot water systems to prevent bacteria. Would stay again.

The Esperance RAC caravan park has set the standard for others to follow.
The staff are friendly and helpful, the amenities are exceptionally clean & modern, (great camp kitchen),  the parking area for vans can accommodate any size vans, and the park location handy to beach area & shopping precinct
We would certainly return here again, & recommend this park for travellers & holiday makers.
Do not book caravan sites 70.  Noisy, light shines in caravan all night, next to bins, mat worn out with water seaping through.
Right on the water lovely place.
Across from the beach, nice park, clean modern facilities

Very nice caravan park. We stayed their 2 nights with a campervan. Had a nice ocean view.
Pool was heated in winter. 25 degrees, enough for swimming.
Facilities are very clean, big camp kitchen, wifi wasn’t that good, but totally fine.

We are staying at the moment in a cabin overlooking the beach and this park would have to be one of the best and cleanest parks I have ever seen . Amenities are 200 percent with camp kitchens and games rooms the best , and also people in the shops so friendly . Very well presented cabins with extra comfortable beds , and all the mod cons . Keep up the good work and give yourselves a pat on the back as a number one park .cheers

Paid $50 for a powered site.
No hot water at all.
They knew it when we booked and didn't say anything.
This place is a gem 💎. Totally worth visiting 😍

Stayed 5 nights at this park,lovely staff,amenities were spotless,well done Bek and team,camp kitchen was amazing,the whole park was the best we have stayed in all around Australia,and great location.Will recommend to anyone.
The most fabulous quality resort.  Thank you a shout out to Rosie for her efficient maintenance of the bathroom families.
Campervan so can't comment on rooms but they look great
Great location
Clean and welcoming.  Beautiful views.
A great spot to relax by the southern ocean.
Great showers, clean well kept park, got a great price directly from the park when we booked an extra night!
Well laid out park, clean and spacious. Excellent amenities. Highly recommended
The beach front villas are spectacular though a little on the expensive side
Highly recommend the staff are so friendly, helpful, & the park is clean & tidy good location & view of the ocean. We love staying here this is our 2nd time here & we will be coming back
Beautiful campsite with excellent shower and laundry facilities right near the main town. Across the road from the beach with great sunrises. Highly recommend

I can't rate rooms for obvious reasons!

Stayed here in Spring 2007 partway through a bicycle tour, so of course I did so again Summer 2025 when I repeated the ride, this time with a small camper van. Excellent camp kitchens complete with fridges and multiple superb electric barbies. Facilities modern and spotless, and the pool was a delight at the end of the day. Onsite birdlife a delight (yellow throated miners, bronzewings, magpie larks etc). Staff superb.
Great layout, plenty of very clean amenities. Excellent staff team ensuring the park and all facilities are presented in an immaculate condition.

Very clean, well organised,  superb amenities,  easy check in and out
Highly recommended

This was by far the best park we had stayed
In, in our journey from Brisbane to Perth over 6 weeks.
The park staff are friendly and their work ethic is second to none. We witnessed staff going above and beyond cleaning things you would never see anywhere else. We made comment to a staff member and their response to us just proved their aim is for the guests to have the best possible stay and cleanliness of the park.

Amazing!

Top notch park. Out of the 40 odd parks we stayed at, this was my top pick.

Well done team rac Esperance. Keep up the great work.

have travelled the world and stayed in caravan parks in the USA, Canada, all over Europe, UK, Ireland and overseas Australia and have never stayed in such an incredible park!!!! Swiss friends stayed here and overwhelmingly recommended it.
-reception excellent
- amenities next level clean and incredible ensuites and showers
- grounds are impecable
- camp kitchen and games 4ooms are fantastic and modern
- internet... yes it has internet and it works!!!
- location over the road from the beach. A nice walk or bike ride into town or out of town.
Fishing at the pier fun
Nothing negative to report.
I will never give a 5 star review again unless it's this good.
Staff were ridiculously helpful rearranging powered sites helping us to extend our stay due to car troubles.

Would have to be the best Park I have stayed in, and there's been many over the years,the kitchen, TV lounge, pool and playground facilities are over the top , cabins s look like they are on another level,then the staff are sooo helpful
New, clean, lovely accommodation for the entire extended family! Excellent location with sea views (dolphins & sometimes Whales out the front too.

We stayed here in a camper van for 4 nights after doing Perth to Esperance and this was BY FAR the nicest site that we stayed in. I cannot recommend it enough. The shower and toilet block is top tier. They are individual rooms with lots of space to change and get ready. The showers were hot and had a waterfall shower head, they were always spotless. The kitchen was always clean. There isn't any equipment in the kitchen but we had what we needed. It is new and well maintained. The pool was great, as was the games room. Everything is close by. There are some really nice runs along the beach from outside the campsite.
The only thing I will say, is the beach outside the campsite isn't very nice. They are doing building works on the beach which means you cannot sit there. Having said that, you can be at some stunning beaches within a 10 min drive and Cape Le Grand in 40mins.

What a wonderful place to stay. Great location, amazing facilities (they even have a dog wash on site), and well cared for. The service was very friendly and helpful.
The only reason I gave four stars, not five, was the small space given to park any medium to larger size van. It's pretty tight.
Will definitely stay here again.

We stayed in a powered site down the back of the park with our cattle dog who is recuperating from a broken leg surgery. The staff were very helpful and the park has fantastic facilities. The camp kitchen is the best I've seen. A must to come and stay if you're at Esperance.
A great park with spacious caravan sites. Amazing amenities, games room and the camp kitchen is spectacular
Toilets are very clean and tidy hot water for the showers, laundries available

We had a wonderful stay at RAC Esperance Holiday Park. The unit was well-equipped and clean, offering all the amenities we needed. The park's location is ideal, with stunning beach views and easy access to nearby lookouts. Highly recommended for a relaxing getaway.

Villas are very good for families.
Service was not good for housekeeping and water heater was not working properly
Top rate. Very good caravan park.

OMG! when previous reviewers mentioned the awesome facilities they were not kidding! hands down this is one of the best caravan parks ever!
spacious, flat, tree lined  camp sites with bathrooms to rival the Hilton hotels! the laundry is fantastic with new washers and dryers and plenty of lines to hang your stuff. as for the kitchen facilities - chef Gordon Ramsay would kill for this. and if you are in groups or just wanting to chill somewhere other than your caravan their recreation room is unbelievably well set up with lovely lounge furniture and a snooker table too. Even the pool is heated to 26degrees. seriously- what more could you want? also the price is exceptionally good value for money. We came for 2 days and stayed for 5 nights - that tells you how good it is!!
Very nice holiday park, modern amenities, we did however have to ask for a different spot as some have trees that get in the way makeing our first spot uneven

Possibly the best caravan park I've ever stayed at. The amenities are 5 star ensuites!

Staff are very friendly and helpful.

A suggestion.  Put all the vans and motor homes in a separate section. That way they can all enjoy the constant noise of reversing sounders and the opening and closing of sliding side doors!

Sublime location, excellent park setting an exciting high-quality standard for caravan travellers, campers and cabins alike. Excellent amenities across the board, lovely waterfront pool at 28C and a short stroll on the Esplanade into town.
Stayed the WA day long weekend in an one bedroom chalet, all new, well equipped and very clean. The camp area was very well maintained.  Well done RAC staff and thank you.
Nice park great location across from beach , $56 with Gday discount

We rented a studio unit, was very good. Would have loved a balcony patio out front to watch ocean but we still were happy choosing this place. Bed was comfy, good air con that was super warm. Loved the shutters were an awesome touch. This place had everything we needed for a 3n stay. A good long but easy enough walk into town for restaurant. Close to jetty for another must walk. Have stayed in 3 different places in Esperance on 3 different occasions and this one wins.
A well maintained RV park with easy access, opposite the beach, spacious sites, and clean amenities. A very busy park. Booking ahead is advisable. Nice foreshore and jetty.

Clean and modern.
Safe spot for the kids.

We had to be booked back here due to a car breakdown and the van had to be towed in. They worked with our Road Side assistance to get us in straight away.  The amenities are lovely and clean and the staff very friendly. Would highly recommend.

The best place we have ever stayed in. Excellent accomodation, super clean 3 bedroom unit, beautiful well keep gardens, etc cant fault the place….JUST ONE LITTLE REQUEST, the cups in the units are so tiny☕️ it will be nice to have coffee mugs to enjoy a decent cuppa…is this a possibility🫖
The shower and toilet area was the best I have ever seen. Also very clean.  The camp kitchen was the best I have seen.  The grounds are well-kept. A great family park.
This park is amazing huge camp kitchen, games room and the showers omg the best. Dog friendly, dog bath. 10/10

Service was very poor. Lady called Monique was not friendly at all. There were 2 of us with big vans. Called first, told them we would be there at 10.30 told that was ok. We got there and tried to park the van in the parking area but had a car parked in the middle of it. No room for our van and my brother was parked on the roadway at the front of the office. Got told we couldn’t stop there, ‘where do we park’ we were told to find somewhere till 11.30. Asked if they would let us in the parking area to turn around. A very rude ‘we can’t do that’ had to make a u turn in the driveway. She was so rude. Would not stay there if it was the only park here. Tried to ring and talk to the manager. The recording said  ‘leave a message and we will get back to you in the next 48 hours’ Obviously they don’t want or need the business.
Exceptional caravan park. Best facilities I have ever seen in a caravan park. Very accomodating staff. Great to see a step change in facilities.

We stayed a week in our motorhome and had a powered site at this wondetful park. This caravan park is like a resort. Its like no other. The facilities are 1st class. The grounds are beautifully maintained  and the staff are friendly and professional. We enjoyed the amazing pool, camp kitchen, TV room, grounds, toilets and ensuites. A beautiful, first class park, within walking distance of the town, overlooking the beach. Top notch.
Sehr ordentliche Campinganlage, kann man nicht negatives sagen, empfehlen wir zu 100% weiter!
Good park nice facilities only concern was the dryers suck your money as they don't work efficiently we spent $50.00 in getting stuff dry over a few days
Amazing
Fantastic caravan park. Clean and large sites. Great amenities blocks. Best park we have stayed in for a while.

The staff were very helpful.
Our ute broke down over Easter, and they did everything possible that we could stay and didn't have to move sites
Thank you so much, girls, at the reception.
The amenities are clean, and the park itself is spotless.

You guys need to put up shower curtains inside the shower cubicles, I felt so exposed in there having a shower especially when you’re sharing next to someone else the water on the tiles is like a mirror into the neighbouring cubicle 😬
Ein Platz der höheren Preisstufe. Dafür sehr geordnet und sauber. Z.t. mit Meerblick, somit stets windig.
Amazing location, and sites and amenities with heaps for kids to do.  And pet friendly

Magnifique emplacement en caravan park. Acceuil trés chaleureux (Nous n'avions réservé qu'une nuit et sommes arrivés avec un jour d'avance, une fois sur place nous n'avons eu aucun souci de rajouter une nuit supplémentaire). Les espaces communs ainsi que les sanitaires sont super. Un petit village convival et auto-suffisant qui est juste magnifique. Nous y retournerons trés certainement. Partir d'Esperance a été trés difficile tellement nous y étions bien. Merci beaucoup.
Very nice, amenities are clean pool and facilities are excellent but very busy

Hands down the best park in Esperance. Luxurious bathrooms. Camp kitchen is elite. There’s a sign on the way in that tests how fast you can run. If you beat 26km/h like this review.
Walking distance to most places

Fantastic.
Clean and tidy
A very well maintained holiday camp, in a superb location
Powered site for 2 nights, bathrooms and laundry beautifully clean, great for kids. Helpful staff.
Was a great place to stop in for a couple of weeks. New facilities.

Fantastic stay in our tent. Facilities are amazing, and so clean.
Highly recommended
Large park with great facilities. Stayed twice and had two enjoyable stays.
Clean and well run park

Hele mooie camping. Vanuit het zwembad en de speeltuin en buitenkeuken kijk je uit over de zee en die je de pier liggen.
Iets duurdere camping,  maar mooie faciliteiten. We waren hier in het weekend.

Stayed for two nights on a powered site. Very well maintained grounds and the facilities are outstanding. They have unisex individual shower and toilet bathrooms. Also ambulant bathrooms and laundry. Reception is well appointed and great service.

Wow what a fantastic park, location and amenities the powered ensuite sites are fantastic and clean, the complimentary soaps were so lovely and fresh

The entire park is gorgeous fantastic for little ones

Great location
Best facilities of any campsite we have stayed at.
Very nice rooms, clean and great facilities.  Washing machine and dishwasher in our room. Coffee machine provided.  Opposite the beach, close to town and tourist attractions.

Great pool, amazing kitchen, nice showers. My friend broke his back om our traveld and the sweet lady in the reception gave us our money back, more than expected.
A very nice clean place, great for kids too.

The wife was really impressed so it's got to be a winner..
But on a serious note the whole experience here was very pleasant. Nice grass caravan lots with plenty of shade and only 200m from a dog friendly beach. My 3yo kelpie who had access to 95% of the caravan park loved the beach walks. Less than a 1kms walk to town was also convenient.  We used Esperance Holiday Park as a base and day tripped to Warton Beach approx 80kms east, also Ocean Road Drive and all the other spectacular beaches and attractions in the region.

What a beautiful park and very well run and maintained.
Great check-in and checkout service.
Good size slab sites.
Clean amenities.
Lovely pool area.
Right across from the beach and great walking paths along the beach front.
Pet friendly.
Great for families and couples.
Highly recommend.

We booked a caravan site for a 21 foot van months ago... we have NEVER had to camp so close to our neighbours in a van park.
We could literally reach out of our bathroom window and touch the windscreen of the RV on the site next door.
Just terrible.
Some communication to RV hire drivers in how to park would be helpful.
Not recommended.

Reception were very accommodating, giving plenty of information. It is a large park, but efficiently run. Staff were visible and always busy. Amenities were very clean. We stayed in our caravan and the site had a ground mat and all essentials were working (power, water). Good balance of trees and children's safe play areas.
Across the road from the beach, and a coffee truck at the entry in the morning, what more could you want! Thanks RAC Esperance!
The best you can think of as a caravan park. Fantastic facility and good location. Strongly recommend it!

Stayed at this park for a week. We had a bay close to the front so able to see the ocean from our caravan. |The facilities are among the best we’ve ever stayed in . There’s a wonderful rec room and campers kitchen overlooking the pool, ocean and playground.|The park is close to town and within walking distance if you don’t mind a good walk. |The amenities are very clean and spacious and showers with large showerheads. |The nightly rate was very good and under $400 for a week as an RAC member. |Can highly recommend .
Such a beautiful park!! Plenty of amenities, camp bathrooms and kitchens are amazing!! Thanks for a great stay
Beautiful park & facilities, centrally located to town with great bicycle pathways along foreshore of gorgeous Esperance Bay.
A 5 star campsite in a great location .

Great variety of facilities. Many toilets and shower blocks distributed throughout the campsite. Large swimming pool and spacious game room for children. Location, the best.
The downside: the bathrooms were not cleaned daily — during my 3-day stay, they were only cleaned once. Also, I felt that the campsites were too close to each other, with tents very close together. The Wi-Fi didn’t work well.

Arrived from South Australia and just wanted to have a hassle free couple of days after a LONG drive!. Some of the caravan parking is a bit tight but a staff member went out of his way to assist in providing some assistance. Staff members are very friendly and helpful. Facilities are modern and well maintained. Will be back.
Best caravan park we’ve stayed at. Amazing facilities, such a great environment.

The team were extremely helpful, we had mechanical issues and they squeezed us in … twice!!
Very friendly and professional team, excellent service and beautifully maintained park and facilities. Thanks for everything!

We had the priviledge to stay over in this park with our big rig for a couple of days. From the moment we arrived, the staff did everything they could to ensure our stay being a memorable one! Excellent service! The park itself is beautifully kempt, the camp kitchen, games room, pool area, and the ablutions were mint! I strongly recommend one to consider this camp as it is well worth a 5 star rating!
Beautiful camp! Family and pet friendly. We have a great time camping in our tent. Facilities are excellent.
Great holiday park, the rooms are clean and neat. Car parks could be a bit bigger. This is our second stay here, and we will be back again.

Our site was really large but very shady and dirty. Super bad for starlink due to huge trees!  Facilities as always with RAC are exceptional and location excellent for walking and riding.  Loved the dog wash 😄
Had 3 nights stay and it was wonderful
We have been staying here for the last 2 days and the place is so amazing. The staff that assisted us are all friendly and helpful. It’s close to the beach and the city centre as well.

Unfortunately not a good review this time.

On arrival receptionist stated ‘you can’t park there’ which would be ok if the architect who laid out the check in bays catered for 10mtr+ rigs towing a trailer. Receptionist then stated ‘well you should have parked out front’, fine if you knew the checkin and access road was a problem.

Site, other than the neighbour initially setting up only 6 inches from the awning due to lack of space on his site. The sites are relatively small if you include the clearances defined on the park map. Based on the companies response below I have removed any references to site clearances but suggest the park map is updated to remove the ambiguity with the current clearance drawing.

Park facilities other than checkin area were excellent

A very flash Caravan park. Great amenities and food location.  Spacious sies with trees. Loved the Thursday evening event held near swimming pool - drinks cart, live music and delicious pulled  pork nachos. Super friendly helpful staff.
Great park. A lot of money has been used to update this park. Love the online check in process. Everything clean and well maintained.
It's ok. Certainly not the best caravan park ever as others mention. For $100 a night a dirt patch that just fits your caravan and car on is steep.
In a caravan so left room blank. All amenities are clean and well presented. Book in process very simple. Great location. Everybody is very friendly. Will be back again.

I was not aware that the time had ticked just past 10pm and the manager came over and was really rude to the 4 people sitting quietly and enjoying a quiet drink.

Next time come over and be polite and not yell from 20 m away and have some decency to approach it better.

“RAC- Yell it’s better”
Super fijne sanitaire voorzieningen!

Easily the best toilets in a caravan park ive seen , awesome location,  great idea of having mats on every site , only complaint I have is the site we were on,  was that hard I couldn't drive pegs into the ground more than a few inches due to base been hard as hell , still 1 of the best parks I've seen

I havent even stayed here yet but the phone calls I have had with Monique regarding my booking have been so friendly, kind & helpful.    So refreshing to talk to someone that's so friendly & willing to help.   I cant wait to stay here !

Fantastic location on the beach. Amenities were very clean even during the busy school holidays. Camping sites were sandy and rocky so make sure you take drill in tent pegs. Lots of shade from big trees. Staff were friendly.
Wimdy

One of the best caravan parks I have been to. I probably would have gave it 5 stars if it wasn’t for the fact the kids had control over the games room tv and could put any mind numbing YouTube garbage on.  Many a time I thought the kids were riding and having fun only to find 20 of them glued to the box.
Stayed in a one of the new cabins, would prefer our car to be parked closer!!
Great holiday park. We visited during Christmas so was at capacity but still didn’t feel like it was crowded. Very clean facilities and common areas. Need to book way in advance.

Arrived to a site that could barely fit our equipment. Ground unable to secure a tent or awning down without a drill. When we politely asked about why we had been wedged into a corner site, the manager literally blew up at us, had an hissy fit, and walked away. Such an embarrassing display from someone who is meant to welcome us and represent the park. In no way shape or form did we deserve to be spoken to like that. Far better options for the price elsewhere in Esperance. We’ve received better customer service at McDonalds. Worst experience. Do not recommend.

We stayed in Jan 2025 in the villas and they are so clean and new! It was a fabulous unit to stay in, especially loved that there was a private washing machine with laundry detergentprovided, a nescafe pod coffee machine, hot choc sachets, hooks in the shower, plenty of blankets, and pool towels. A washing line either on the side of the house or under the balcony would be great though.

Tent camped here Dec. site 215 up the back \ Top area. Ground is hard so bring drill pegs. Best RAC camp we have stayed at in terms of facilities. Very communicative staff with regular text messages and they were patient when young kids did not follow the rules. Villas look awesome. Nearly all sites have shade. Advantage of being at the back is that the site acts as a wind break and we were never as cold as those facing the ocean. Park also put on twice daily activities during the holiday period including a kids movie every evening. Great place to stay in Esperance.
We stayed in Azure Lodge and it was brilliant- so comfortable and spacious... hard to believe we were at a caravan park. We'd definitely come back 🤩

Stayed the caravan park, our site was beautiful, the facilities are brand new and cleaned regularly. Staff were really friendly and Micheal gave us some great advice on different places to visit during our stay. A great campsite, I cannot recommend it highly enough.
Fabulous park, lovely staff, clean amenities. thanks RAC Esperance we had a wonderful Christmas there 🫶

Absolutely stunning park, the best facilities I have ever experienced in a caravan park. The toilets and amenities were so lovely, excellent camp kitchen, activity room and pool was pristine.
We were super lucky we had the best sites, really spacious and beautiful green grass.
Groundsman was really helpful giving us some tips on where to visit locally and frequent communication on text informing us of all the activities.  Will definitely be back. Thank you RAC Esperance
My family and I camped here over Christmas and it was so lovely, staff were great, amenities were clean and the park was in such immaculate condition, would definitely stay here again!
Great location, kids had a blast well organised and super clean

Our tent site did not have a tent mat which we thought rather strange because all the other sites appeared to have one.

Special appreciation to the cleaners who kept the ablution blocks and camp kitchens and waste stations closest to our tent site, in a reasonably clean condition at all times. Our children enjoyed the playground and Recreation Room. The main camp kitchen was very well organised with plenty of facilities.

Would be good to have another small camp kitchen for those who camp at Thistle Cove Loop and Pink Lake Loop. It was overall a good camp experience for our family.
New expansion looks amazing! One of the best parks in the state.
New facilities good for families and pets. You can stay and chill with the facilities or head out to adventures.

This has to be one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at. Hubby is somewhat annoyed with the high standards as he gets a kick out of ‘recommending improvements’ that he would do, but here he can’t!!! Everything from staff to amenities, location (which gets a cool breeze in the heat of the afternoon), other campers etc etc were spot on. I can’t remember ever giving another park 5*, but this one deserves it.
Great place, friendly helpful staff.
Best amenities I have seen in a caravan park. Only problem with this park is , it's very tight/crowded and quite noisy.
Wow this caravan park is one of the best I have ever been to! Everything is super clean and well looked after, and the bathrooms are amazing!
Friendly, super bathrooms, absolutely the best camp kitchen I have ever seen!!! One of the best CP I have stayed at, and I have been travelling for 18 months. Thank you for a wonderful stay 😊
Amazing stay!! Perfect common areas, super clean toilets and very easy check in! Very very recommended!!
Amazing staff that helped us out even though the park was fully booked and we arrived without a booking. Worth the extra money for the awesome facilities.

Beautiful location and place, staff where fantastic there even know I didn’t have a cot or cot sheets and sheets in the room where dirty and bed unmade . When I got cot sheets they were stained and dirty aswell, washing machine had so much mould in, toilet leaking a lot of green stuff, and dishwasher smelt so bad, bugs in the floor and didn’t look cleaned so we cleaned when we got there ( not big clean people ) . I Didn’t initially complain but I did write on the “repairs” paper the toilet and washing machine. I got a email to clarify the staff were fantastic and offered a $100 refund. Then they decided not to reply or give me any sort of refund . They now won’t return any email I’ve sent to them or give me the $100 refund they promised.

The park is great but the older gentleman that works there that told my 4 year old to go to school because he can’t read the sign is way out of line. Keep those comments to yourself. We definitely won’t be back!

Loved it here.  Great location across the road from a nice beach.  Sites are tight to get in with narrow road.  But sites are roomy.  Fantastic modern new facilities.  Very impressive.  Heated pool.  Very dog friendly with pool bags everywhere.  Extended my stay.  Reception staff lovely and helpful.  I would stay here again  and highly recommend

Stayed at the park on a powered slab site. It's a busy park with lots of families even though it's not school holidays, lots of interstate families. They have great amenities in the new part of the park. There's a great camp kitchen and pool. Great value for money.
Excellent Caravan Park with well kept grounds, clean and well appointed cabins opposite an amazing beach. I'm definitely coming back to the Park and I'll recommend it to others.❤️

Estuvimos en muchos RACs desde Perth hasta aquí y debo decir que este me pareció el mejor de todos (y eso que amé todos los campings del RAC)
Aparte de estar súper bien cuidado y limpio, y que todo el mundo sea amable, encima da a la playa, no desperdician papel o tiempo sino que te mandan todo por mensaje de texto desde el código hasta el mapa, así que realmente es un placer quedarnos aquí! Gracias!

Love Esperance and always make a stop as we go through. We stay in the caravan sites and as normal the park is wonderful. Sites are easy to get to and camp kitchen is brilliant. As expected for a RAC park. Check in was easy with their online check in.
Highly recommend this park if coming through. Pleasant walking distance or easy bike ride along the foreshore to town centre.
Great park , great amenities.
Huge and busy. Awesome facilities as to be expected by RAC Parks these days.

We stayed with our van.
Amenities & park were spotless.
There was even a parents bathroom, which was so great with the kids.

This place, by far, is "THE BEST HOLIDAY CAMPS" I have ever stayed at and the best Caravan parks in Esperance. The beach is only a short walk across the road, the town is only a half hour walk, there's free wifi all round and best of all, the camping facilities are all fully equipped with the top of the range modern day features so you can never go wrong.
New facilities and very clean

Excellent. Not the most expensive caravan park in Esperance. However has the best resort feeling in esperance. The cleanest amenities and the whole park was maintained brilliant. Friendly and efficient staff.
Almost brand new facilities. Would definitely recommend staying here.

Just WOW. The most family friendly park in W.A. Perfect location among the greatest beaches in the world. Friendly staff, beautiful amenities including family shower/bathroom/toilets all with new, modern fittings and appliances! Deserves an award for sure!

6 star caravan park , site 43/44 is huge big enough for our bus and car on grass... The facilities were amazing the kitchen is better than most mansion 😁, the play room is great for the kids. The shower facilities are very new and clean. The caravan park is massive and always clean.. the pool is heated and so nice. The grass area and play yard with movie tv was a pleasure to be at ... Across the road from the beach and 5 mins from town so not in the thick of it .... John the maintenance guy was a great bloke cheers for having a chat... The prices were great for what they offer ... IMO any Karen with negative reviews on this park probably didn't ask nicely or was rude in the first place .... They are very flexible with sites if they don't suit ...
Guter Camping. W-Lan war schwach. WC-Anlagen sind sauber. Personal sehr freundlich. Gute und saubere Küche!

The RAC Campground in Esperance is fantastic! The atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming, making it the perfect place to unwind. All the facilities are modern and impeccably clean, from the bathrooms to the laundry area. The camp kitchen and BBQ spots are well-equipped and make cooking easy and enjoyable. Plus, the beach is just a short walk away, so you can enjoy Esperance’s stunning coastline whenever you like. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a comfortable and well-maintained place to stay in Esperance!

3 nights extended to 5 pre booked, 2 adults,  powered site. RACQ members with reciprocal rights. This is one of the best parks we have encountered. They have set the bar high with a commercial grade camp kitchen, spacious and well appointed games room, kids play  area and pool zone. The amenities are very good with a new block of ensuite style opening during our stay which were exceptional. Plenty of washing machines/dryers as well as heaps of line space.
The only issue we spoke of was the narrow roads between sites causing some campers grief trying to reverse larger vans to site. There was considerable movement of cars near us to allow for new arrivals or those leaving to safely navigate. The roads are one way however this doesn’t prevent the wrangle. I would suggest more attention is paid to the size of the set-up and the site allocations when booking.
Highly recommend this park when visiting Esperance.

This is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed. All the amenities are brilliant. The sites are a good size. Right across from the beach and a 2km walk into town on a track.highly recommend. Coffee van out the front also a bonus.
Best park we have been to.
Great staff, great facilities, close to the town center, loved it.
Superb site with the best showers/wash facilities we have every seen and we camp a lot in the UK. Top marks...

Best caravan park I have ever stayed at. We had a van site with an ensuite which was great & better than many hotels I have stayed. Laundry, Camp kitchen and games room are great.as is the pool. Thee whole park looks new. Rates are very reasonable for camping Highly recommend you to stay here.
A fantastic campground, with great facilities. The only issue is it’s so popular, that it feels crowded.
Best amenities
Awesome place across the road from the beach

Amenities are top notch. Heated pool. Showers are perfection. Clean and well maintained. Not huge sites but decent. If you just feel like a few creature comforts it's a great park. Staff are lovely too
Yeah, really nice stay here. Cabins looked beautiful and new. We had a caravan spot and it was nice. Amenities were very clean, new, and plenty to spare.

Not our best experience on this trip. Booked a mat site but was allocated an unkept sandy site. Reception staff were quick to tell us it was not their problem and to take it up with Big4 who we booked through. No apology offered for their system issues.
Lovely caravan park safe for kids near the beach and town centre with good facilities
Amazing park, sites are a little tight and awkward to get into. Location is amazing and amenities are great.

Wonderful staff and well maintained. Amenities large and clean. Large sites 166 was an awesome site near the toilets. Family park with activities for kids in the morning and movie every night. Across the road from the beach but their pool is heated. Huge kitchen and recreation room. Both clean and overlooks pool and playground.
Very poor attitude from staff!
Great park with excellent amenities as expected for RAC.
Neat and clean park with plenty of space between sites.  Facilities are modern and clean.
Powered sites are roomy! Enough room for car, van and to have awning out

Très beau et très grand site,  très moderne.
Belles salles de douches.
Cuisine partagée ultra moderne avec en face un espace TV et lecture.
Piscine avec sur vue mer.
Les espaces partagés sont assez éloignés des emplacements surtout pour le BBQ et Cuisine quand il fait 10°.
Prix 68$ ~40€
Great location. Great helpful staff. The amenities etc are awesome and well maintained.  Good spot to hold up for a while to explore all Esperance has to offer.  Definitely recommend
Lovely, friendly, spotless.
We stayed in an ensuite site which was well set up with toiletries. Fantastic amenities & staff. Look for to returning.
Excellent caravan /cabin park, with the usual high RAC standards.   Great location next to beach with a nice cafe next door.
Exceptional amenities. Could not fault this place at all
We had a fantastic weekend stay with young adults and our dog at the RAC holiday park. I definitely recommend this place for families.
Amenities clean and tidy. Grounds well maintained. Pleasant staff.
Fantastic park, great facilities (including a family bathroom with a bath!), very helpful staff and great location. Would highly recommend.
Luxury in a caravan park. Wow what a place. Worth every cent.

It is one of the best holiday park, more like glamping than camping. The toilets are new and clean. especially the family toliet with the bath tub wifi all over. Hot water and fridge and pet friendly. I would like to thank the receptionists and the staff who looked after me and my daughter with vip treatment. Definitely felt special. Thank you from us and zero
Excellent facilities.  Modern and clean.  Well laid out park.  Friendly staff.  Would definitely recommend ❤️
The bathroom is spacious, high quality and clean. However the access road for powered sites are narrow. There is limited room to reverse caravan into the site.
A very upmarket park. Amazing camp kitchen and games/TV room. We don’t have kids but perfect place for them. Clean amenities. Friendly and helpful staff

Absolutely shocked and appalled by the customer service. We wanted to stay one night with our pups and they wouldn’t let us as they have a two dog limit.. bring 8 kids no problem.. three dogs no way…

Wow in this day and age where dogs are family.. this place is appalling
Magic spot. Off peak rates are excellent for family of 5. Stayed 10 days. Huge camp kitchen and immaculate bathrooms. Baths as well for little ones.

Everything about this park is brilliant about this park!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at the RAC Esperance Holiday Park and overall, it was an outstanding experience. This holiday park offers a perfect blend of relaxation, comfort, and beautiful surroundings, making it an ideal destination for a family vacation.

Location and Scenery
Situated in a stunning coastal area, RAC Esperance Holiday Park boasts breathtaking views and easy access to pristine beaches. The park's location is perfect for those who love to explore nature, with plenty of opportunities for beach walks, swimming, and enjoying the natural beauty of Esperance. The serene environment truly enhances the overall experience, making it a perfect retreat from the hustle and bustle of daily life.

Facilities and Accommodation
The facilities at RAC Esperance Holiday Park are top-notch. We stayed in a well-appointed caravan site that was spacious and equipped with all the necessary amenities. The park also offers a variety of accommodation options, including cabins and camping sites, catering to different preferences and needs. The cleanliness and maintenance of the facilities were impeccable, ensuring a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

Activities and Amenities
There is no shortage of activities to keep everyone entertained at RAC Esperance Holiday Park. From the well-maintained playgrounds for children to the communal BBQ areas and swimming pool, the park provides ample opportunities for fun and relaxation. The well-stocked camp kitchen and clean bathroom facilities added to the convenience and overall positive experience.

Thank you, RAC Esperance Holiday Park, for providing a wonderful setting for our family vacation. We look forward to returning in the future and enjoying more of what your park has to offer.
Staff here are wonderful.  Park amenities are first class.  We had enough room but we found our neighbours are a bit closer than we prefer.

The park facilities are nice and new, however the staff have zero care for their customers welfare.

We had a large branch fall onto our new van and the park manger didn’t even bother to call us.

The assistant manger was only concerned about the park’s liability and did not once ask if we were ok, instead said it isn’t that bad, just took pictures and waddled back to her office.

We called the RAC Perth office and requested a refund which they had to then ask for the managers permission.

Honestly, we understand unfortunate events occur, however the staff displayed appalling behaviour when it came to our safety and welfare. So beware if you have a branch fall on your van as the RAC will not cover anything under their insurance and remember you sign a waver prior to entering the park.
Awesome and very helpfull staff

Really nice park to camp in and in a great location. Easy online check in and check out service. The only  RAC campsite in WA so far I've been to that doesn't offer any washing up liquid in its kitchens so remember to bring cleaning products. The only suggestion I can make is to add mesh doors to your toilets. The doors are wide open so the bathrooms are full of bugs. There also needs to be proper ventilation put into bathroom areas as all the ceilings are covered in mold. All in all a nice stay.

What a great caravan park. Many other Big 1s don't even come close to how greatly overall this is. Adults are thought about, as much as children, with room between sites, never felt like a sardine.

Very fancy and busy caravan park. Stunning facilities, toilet, showers and kitchens. Pool! Beautiful gardens and very conveniently located to shops and jetty. Gets very windy there, so make sure your camp set up is ready for scary winds and belting rain.

This is a well maintained caravan park in a great location with very good facilities and amenities however our visit was ruined by staff with an arrogant attitude and no ability to reason or speak to people. We booked our visit about three months before requesting to be located on a site near the villas as we had family staying there.
On arrival we were advised where our site was which was at the opposite end of the park to the villas, next to an entrance and the rubbish bins. It was also right next to a busy dual carriage way which was noisy. We asked to move to another site explaining how we had family staying and that we requested this when we booked only to be told that there was nothing about it on the booking and that was our site and NO you can’t move, there is nothing else available. The staff member was rude and arrogant and treated us like crap.
We tried to speak to the manager on numerous occasions by both personally and by phone but was continually told that they were not available. To make matters worse we went for a walk through the park every evening and found 15 to 20 vacant sites.
The road noise was so bad that it woke us every morning at about 5.00am so after 3 of our 6 days booked we left. We have stayed at many RAC caravan parks over many years and always found them to awesome and managed and staffed by accomodating and courteous people, this is NOT the case in Esperance. We will not be returning to this site under the current staffing arrangement.

Beautiful location and amazing family only bathrooms with full sized bath tubs in them! My kids were so happy having a real bath as we travel full time and I was happy this feature cost me nothing extra lol.

Sites are so crammed in and wish reception would have asked the simple questions such as would you like to be closer to ablutions, people or options of what available etc which the park I use to work at we always asked little questions like that. We ended up packed in amongst alot of grey nomads. I had a walk around the park later and noticed the back areas were so empty and we would of preferred that along with using the smaller camp kitchen as it suits us more to contain the little ones when having dinner instead of a large kitchen with lots going on. Don't get me wrong though the main kitchen is amazing with space for everyone and lots of little chit chat happening with fellow travellers.

Cons would be-
1) Not engaging with guests in regards to sites when it's empty enough.

2) Having to go and ask for family room code as wasn't told when checking in (staff in the park was super helpful with this though and very friendly)

3) Only 1 remote to share between games room and kitchen which totals 3 different TVs and alot of hunting for the remote. (They could have 3 remotes and just have them chained on the wall)

4) Small sites with narrowing roads making it hard to manoeuvre or get to site when someone is setting up.

5) No dishwashing liquid dispenser or paper towels in the kitchen.

6) No recycling bin in kitchen

Overall we have enjoyed our stay amd what's on offer here and would recommend this park but just wanted to note the few little things above. Everything was absolutely beautiful, staff friendly and location perfect for a stroll along the beach. Kids highlight has definitely been the playground and bath in family room 😊

We didn't swim in the pool as although says heated it was not warm enough to feel we could swim but saw others still giving it a crack 🙂

We've travelled right across Australia and this is one of the best Caravan parks in the country! Reasonable priced, roomy sites with slabs or shade cloth. Amenities absolutely spotless.
